3M+ ZIL Removed From Circulation Since Zilliqa Introduced ‘Burning’
articles.description: In brief: Over 3 million Zilliqa coins have been removed from circulation since the network implemented its version of burning ZIL ZIL fee burning, simply sends the gas paid out in each transaction to a special address where all mining rewards come from This gas can then be used for block rewards in a process known as ‘recycling’ The President of Zilliqa, Amrit Kummer, has updated the ZIL...
